oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Grit and grace: Resilience skills for a sustainable veterinary career
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Davison, Andi
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: Leadership, particularly in veterinary settings, requires a unique blend of resilience, empathy and self-care to meet the complex demands of the role. As veterinary managers, we un­derstand that effective leadership means supporting our teams and empowering them to thrive. However, research shows that the pressures associated with these roles often result in high levels of stress, burnout and decreased satisfaction in personal and professional life. This module on sustainable leadership provides a framework designed to equip leaders with strategies that not only enhance their effectiveness but also support their well-being over the long term.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: American Association of Bovine Practitioners Conference Proceedings; Vol. 58 No. 2 (2025): 2025 AABP Annual Conference Proceedings; 143
oai_dc:dc.dc:rights: Copyright (c) 2026 American Association of Bovine Practitioners
